description: DAVID Scraper 2 — how humans communicate beyond lexicon

phonetics-ipa.label: Phonetics & IPA / Speech Production
phonetics-ipa.description: Articulatory and acoustic phonetics, IPA notation, speech production, prosody, intonation

non-verbal.label: Non-Verbal Communication
non-verbal.description: Gesture, facial expression, proxemics, paralinguistics, kinesics, turn-taking

sign-languages.label: Sign Languages
sign-languages.description: Natural signed languages — grammar, phonology (cherology), sociolinguistics

pragmatics.label: Pragmatics
pragmatics.description: Deixis, speech acts, discourse markers, code-switching — context-dependent meaning

topics.notes: Core notation system for speech sounds across DAVID pronunciation work

topics.notes: Place and manner of articulation; consonant/vowel production

topics.name: Intonation
topics.notes: Pitch contours, tone boundaries, question/statement marking

topics.name: Gesture
topics.notes: Co-speech and emblematic gestures; kinesic communication

topics.notes: Emotion display, micro-expressions, cross-cultural variation

topics.name: Proxemics

topics.notes: Prosody, pitch, tempo, voice quality beyond lexical content

topics.notes: Posture, orientation, and holistic non-verbal signaling
